pattern_text: Your account will be frozen unless you provide your OTP immediately
Akaun anda akan dibekukan jika anda tidak sahkan OTP sekarang
Your parcel is being held and requires a small release fee
Pakej anda ditahan sila bayar yuran pelepasan sekarang
Pay a registration fee before attending the job interview
Waran tangkap akan dikeluarkan jika bayaran tidak dibuat segera
Transfer the money now to avoid further action
Install this application so our officer can access your device
